layout.notes: Optimized for text clarity and quick understanding.

elements.content: Large Language Models (LLMs) have limited knowledge.
RAG solves this by retrieving up-to-date information.
RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation – a smart trick!
1. Question is given to the LLM.
2. RAG retrieves relevant information from a database.
3. RAG augments the original question with the retrieved data.
